payload.name: apply_patch
payload.arguments:
{"patch":"--- a/src/modules/auth/services.py
+++ b/src/modules/auth/services.py
@@ -45,6 +45,12 @@
     async def authenticate(self, username: str, password: str) -> dict:
         user = await self.get_by_username(username)
+        # Rate limit: max 5 failed attempts per 15 minutes
+        if await self.is_rate_limited(username):
+            raise TooManyRequestsError("auth.rate_limited")
         if not user or not verify_password(password, user.hashed_password):
             raise UnauthorizedError("auth.invalid_credentials")
"}

payload.last_agent_message: Added rate limiting to authentication service. Applied patch to services.py adding 5-attempt limit per 15-minute window. All existing tests pass.
